'''鈭歱-y-ng''' ('''payanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calcimine|calcimine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calcimine|calcimine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-y-ng
|-
! Lemma
| payanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:payangithi|payangithi]] || [[word:payangiji|payangiji]] || [[word:payangishi|payangishi]] || [[word:payangi|payangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:payanguthuth|payanguthuth]] || [[word:payangujuj|payangujuj]] || [[word:payangushush|payangushush]] || [[word:payang|payang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:payanguthu|payanguthu]] || [[word:payanguju|payanguju]] || [[word:payangushu|payangushu]] || [[word:payangu|payangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:payangufuth|payangufuth]] || [[word:payangufuj|payangufuj]] || [[word:payangufush|payangufush]] || [[word:payanguf|payanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:payangethe|payangethe]] || [[word:payangeje|payangeje]] || [[word:payangeshe|payangeshe]] || [[word:payange|payange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:payangothoth|payangothoth]] || [[word:payangojoj|payangojoj]] || [[word:payangoshosh|payangoshosh]] || [[word:payang|payang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:payangotho|payangotho]] || [[word:payangojo|payangojo]] || [[word:payangosho|payangosho]] || [[word:payango|payango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:payangofoth|payangofoth]] || [[word:payangofoj|payangofoj]] || [[word:payangofosh|payangofosh]] || [[word:payangof|payangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:payang忙th忙|payang忙th忙]] || [[word:payang忙j忙|payang忙j忙]] || [[word:payang忙sh忙|payang忙sh忙]] || [[word:payang忙|payang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:payangathath|payangathath]] || [[word:payangajaj|payangajaj]] || [[word:payangashash|payangashash]] || [[word:payang|payang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:payangatha|payangatha]] || [[word:payangaja|payangaja]] || [[word:payangasha|payangasha]] || [[word:payanga|payanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:payangafath|payangafath]] || [[word:payangafaj|payangafaj]] || [[word:payangafash|payangafash]] || [[word:payangaf|payangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:payangasha|payangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopayangasha|gopayangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipayangasha|gokipayangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:payangn眉sha|payangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopayangnkn眉sha|gopayangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipayangn眉sha|gokipayangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:payangsh毛sha|payangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopayangnksh毛sha|gopayangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipayangsh毛sha|gokipayangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:payangrosha|payangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopayangnkrosha|gopayangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipayangrosha|gokipayangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:payangmusha|payangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopayangnkmusha|gopayangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipayangmusha|gokipayangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:payangsherasha|payangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopayangnksherasha|gopayangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipayangsherasha|gokipayangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:payangasha|payangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopayangnkngasha|gopayangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipayangasha|gokipayangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:payangyasha|payangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopayangnkyasha|gopayangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipayangyasha|gokipayangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:payangyamasha|payangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopayangnkyamasha|gopayangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipayangyamasha|gokipayangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:payangn眉sh毛sha|payangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopayangnkn眉sh毛sha|gopayangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipayangn眉sh毛sha|gokipayangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:payangn眉rosha|payangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopayangnkn眉rosha|gopayangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipayangn眉rosha|gokipayangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:payangn眉musha|payangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopayangnkn眉musha|gopayangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipayangn眉musha|gokipayangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:payangsh毛n眉sha|payangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopayangnksh毛n眉sha|gopayangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipayangsh毛n眉sha|gokipayangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:payangsh毛rosha|payangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopayangnksh毛rosha|gopayangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipayangsh毛rosha|gokipayangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:payangsh毛musha|payangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopayangnksh毛musha|gopayangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipayangsh毛musha|gokipayangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:payangron眉sha|payangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopayangnkron眉sha|gopayangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipayangron眉sha|gokipayangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:payangrosh毛sha|payangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopayangnkrosh毛sha|gopayangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipayangrosh毛sha|gokipayangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:payangromusha|payangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopayangnkromusha|gopayangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipayangromusha|gokipayangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:payangmun眉sha|payangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopayangnkmun眉sha|gopayangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipayangmun眉sha|gokipayangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:payangmush毛sha|payangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopayangnkmush毛sha|gopayangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipayangmush毛sha|gokipayangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:payangmurosha|payangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopayangnkmurosha|gopayangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipayangmurosha|gokipayangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:payang|payang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙y忙ng|p忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopayang|hopayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙y忙ng|hop忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopayang|hohopayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙y忙ng|hohop忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉payang|n眉payang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙y忙ng|n眉p忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉payang|n眉n眉payang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙y忙ng|n眉n眉p忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂payang|n茂payang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙y忙ng|n茂p忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂payang|n茂n茂payang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙y忙ng|n茂n茂p忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupayang|lupayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙y忙ng|lup忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupayang|lulupayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙y忙ng|lulup忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipayang|lipayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙y忙ng|lip忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipayang|lilipayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙y忙ng|lilip忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopayang|kopayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙y忙ng|kop忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopayang|kokopayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙y忙ng|kokop忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepayang|kepayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙y忙ng|kep忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepayang|kekepayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙y忙ng|kekep忙y忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
